creator: yds@CoolRat.org
text:
--On Friday, June 01, 2007 8:53 AM +0200 Janos Mohacsi <mohacsi@niif.hu> 
wrote:

> I don't see the greylisting support added in the latest mail/spamd-3.7_3.
> Can you revise the port or should I send a separate patch?
> Regards,
>     Janos Mohacsi

Seems to me this PR was closed without applying the patch I submitted way 
back when.  In any case OpenBSD 4.1 is out with official greylisting 
support rather than Bob Beck's preview variant I submitted.  Perhaps it's 
time to revisit updating this port to 4.1 rather than 4.0 as the last PR 
did.  I've made some improvements to the port since so I'll see about 
rolling another update.

-- 
Yarema
